title: Psidium thyrsoideum
taxonomy: Psidium thyrsoideum is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It belongs to the genus Psidium, which includes a variety of guava species. The Myrtaceae family is a large group of flowering plants that includes eucalyptus, clove, and myrtle. Psidium thyrsoideum is native to Central and South America, and its classification is within the kingdom Plantae. It is closely related to other guava species, which are also members of the Myrtaceae family.
uses: Psidium thyrsoideum, a species of guava, has been reported to possess various medicinal properties.
